name: ccpraxis-local
description: Local ccpraxis plugin bundle. Plugins are loaded directly from the repo's plugins/ directory; no remote marketplace.

plugins.name: beacon
plugins.description: Mark Claude Code sessions as ongoing work; resume them later via claude-beacon.

plugins.name: backpack
plugins.description: What you pack to take into a /sandbox container. Declares tools, runtimes, and project-setup commands so they're auto-restored on every container rebuild.

plugins.name: sandbox
plugins.description: Prepare a project for running Claude Code in an isolated Docker-or-Podman (auto-detected) dev container. Provides /sandbox:setup and /sandbox:test; the canonical entry point is the claude-sandbox launcher's auto-prompt.

plugins.name: steward
plugins.description: Meta-plugin that maintains ccpraxis itself. Provides /steward:backup (config + vault sync), /steward:setup-project (onboard a project), /steward:ccpraxis-extend (add or change skills/plugins), /steward:update (safe Claude Code updater), and /steward:audit (read-only subagent fan-out into a dated report).

plugins.name: blueprint
plugins.description: Authors durable blueprints (interrogate → decompose into scoped packages with a dependency DAG → fresh-context auditor gate). Plan-only, host-usable. Provides /blueprint:create and /blueprint:manage; the blueprints it produces are executed by the sandbox-only butler plugin.

plugins.name: butler
plugins.description: Executes blueprints. /butler:dispatch-fleet starts a deterministic, token-free orchestrator script that drives detached headless coordinators (one per package, scoped worker subagents, hook-enforced discipline) and auto-resumes across usage/token limits; /butler:drive-solo is the single interactive execute verb — a thin loop over the perl director bp-drive-next.pl that drives one blueprint, a named set, or ALL audited blueprints to done in one host-or-sandbox session (flat worker layer, director-managed keep-awake + self-governed usage-limit sleep-through); /butler:reporter is the interactive front door; /butler:status reports. Start-or-continue (no resume verb). Fleet is sandbox-only; pairs with the host-side blueprint plugin.

plugins.name: todo
plugins.description: Personal todo notes synced to your private vault. Provides /todo:create (save a note), /todo:manage (list/view/edit/delete/done), and /todo:resume (load a note and work on it). Backed by scripts/todo-sync.pl; pushed by /steward:backup.
